document.description: Valid UK visa allows visa-free or simplified access to additional countries beyond passport privileges

unlocks.conditions: Valid multi-entry UK, US, or Schengen visa
unlocks.notes: Applies to nationals who normally require a visa for Albania

unlocks.conditions: Valid multi-entry UK visa (used at least once)
unlocks.notes: UK visa must have been used for entry to UK at least once

unlocks.conditions: Valid multi-entry UK, US, Canada, or Schengen visa
unlocks.notes: Maximum 15 days per entry

unlocks.conditions: Valid multi-entry UK or Schengen visa
unlocks.notes: 90 days within 180 days

unlocks.conditions: Valid multi-entry UK, US, or Schengen visa
unlocks.notes: For transit or tourism purposes only

unlocks.conditions: Valid multi-entry UK, US, or Schengen visa
unlocks.notes: 30 days per visit

unlocks.conditions: Valid multi-entry visa or residence permit from UK, US, Canada, or Schengen
unlocks.notes: Document must be valid. 90 days per 180-day period.

unlocks.conditions: Valid UK, US, or Schengen visa or residence permit
unlocks.notes: 90 days within any 180-day period

unlocks.conditions: Valid UK, US, or Schengen visa with minimum 5 days remaining validity
unlocks.additionalRequirements: Entry via Minsk National Airport only
unlocks.notes: Must enter via Minsk airport. Must have medical insurance.

unlocks.conditions: Valid UK, US, Ireland, or Schengen visa or residence permit
unlocks.additionalRequirements: Must apply for Turkey e-Visa (simplified process)
unlocks.notes: UK visa allows e-Visa application. Normally some nationalities cannot get e-Visa.

unlocks.conditions: Valid multiple-entry UK, US, or Schengen visa or residence
unlocks.notes: Makes e-Visa application easier and faster

unlocks.conditions: Valid UK, US, Canada, Japan, or Schengen visa, or UK residence permit
unlocks.notes: No visa required for Mexico if holding valid UK visa/residence

unlocks.conditions: Valid UK visa with minimum 3 months remaining validity
unlocks.notes: UK visa must have been used for entry to UK

unlocks.conditions: Valid multi-entry UK visa
unlocks.notes: Visa must have been used for entry to UK at least once

unlocks.conditions: Valid UK, US, Japan, Australia, Canada, Schengen, or Singapore visa
unlocks.additionalRequirements: Must have return ticket to UK (or country that issued visa)
unlocks.notes: 7-day visa-free stay only. Must fly back to visa-issuing country.

unlocks.conditions: Valid UK, US, Canada, or Schengen visa
unlocks.notes: Must purchase tourist card on arrival ($10)

unlocks.conditions: Valid UK residence permit or multiple-entry visa
unlocks.notes: Simplified visa-on-arrival process. Some reports indicate this benefit.

unlocks.conditions: Valid UK, US, Canada, Australia, or New Zealand visa with previous entry to that country
unlocks.notes: Transit without Visa (TWOV) program. Must have used the visa previously.

unlocks.conditions: Holders of valid UK, US, Schengen, or EEA residence permits
unlocks.notes: Visa on arrival or visa-free entry depending on nationality

unlocks.conditions: Valid UK, US, Japan, South Korea, or Schengen visa
unlocks.notes: E-Visa process is faster and approval more likely with UK visa
